prose.en: Critical objectives, capabilities, and services that external stakeholders depend on or expect from the organization are understood and communicated
Establish criteria for determining the criticality of capabilities and services as viewed by internal and external stakeholders
Determine (e.g., from a business impact analysis) assets and business operations that are vital to achieving mission objectives and the potential impact of a loss (or partial loss) of such operations

Establish and communicate resilience objectives (e.g., recovery time objectives) for delivering critical capabilities and services in various operating states (e.g., under attack, during recovery, normal operation)

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.BE-04
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.BE-04
nist-withdrawal.prose: Dependencies and critical functions for delivery of critical services are established

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.BE-05
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.BE-05
nist-withdrawal.prose: Resilience requirements to support delivery of critical services are established for all operating states (e.g. under duress/attack, during recovery, normal operations)
